title: On Robert Riddel.
content:
To Riddel, much-lamented man,
            This ivied cot was dear;
        Reader, dost value matchless worth?
            This ivied cot revere.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Burns, titled "On Robert Riddel.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
